\begin{problem}{Maximum Subarray Sum}{standard input}{standard output}{1.0 seconds}{256 megabytes}

Given an array of $N$ integers, find the maximum sum of a contiguous non-empty subarray.

\inputfile
The first line contains a single integer $N$ ($1 \le N \le 10^5$).
The second line contains $N$ integers $A_1, A_2, \dots, A_N$ ($-10^6 \le A_i \le 10^6$).

\outputfile
Output a single integer, the maximum sum of a contiguous non-empty subarray.

\example
\input{../../tests/01}
\output{../../tests/01.a}
\input{../../tests/02}
\output{../../tests/02.a}

\note
In the first example, the maximum sum is obtained from the subarray $[2, 3, -1, 2]$ which sum to 6.

\end{problem}
